summary: Iteration 51 - EchoAi³ Redesigned Canvas Testing Complete. All 23 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Canvas UI fully redesigned from chatbot to Synthetic Command Center with all requested features verified: CircuitBoard icon hero, terminal-style command input with 'EchoAi³ >' prompt, Intelligence Briefing Cards (not chat bubbles), VoiceOrb button, ACKNOWLEDGE/FLAG buttons, fingerprint trace IDs, processing pipeline visualization, and Session Ledger sidebar.
seed_data_creation: None required - uses existing operational data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 51 tested the REDESIGNED EchoAi³ Canvas - completely rebuilt from chatbot to Synthetic Command Center. All backend endpoints working: POST /api/echoai3/think (main intelligence with intent classification, cross-module data, LLM synthesis), GET /api/echoai3/sessions, GET /api/echoai3/session/{id}, DELETE /api/echoai3/session/{id}, POST /api/echoai3/feedback, GET /api/echoai3/trace/{message_id}, GET /api/echoai3/health (9 domains), POST /api/echoai3/voice/transcribe (returns 422 without file as expected). Intent classification works for all types: answer, simulate, recommend, forecast, compare, alert, explain, quantify. Frontend Canvas redesign verified: CircuitBoard icon hero (not chat bubbles), 'EchoAi³ >' terminal-style command input, VoiceOrb with pulsing animations, Intelligence Briefing Cards with domain tags (FINANCE green, EVENTS purple, INVENTORY orange), confidence % badges, data completeness % badges, source badges, ACKNOWLEDGE/FLAG buttons (not thumbs up/down), fingerprint trace IDs, processing pipeline visualization (CLASSIFYING INTENT → RETRIEVING DATA → DOMAIN REASONING → SYNTHESIZING), Session Ledger sidebar with OPERATIONAL status badge. User queries rendered as gold command lines (not chat bubbles). Domain rule alerts displayed with severity colors.

backend_endpoints.echoai3_health: PASS - GET /api/echoai3/health returns status=operational, 9 domains, TraceLedger active, llm_key_configured=true
backend_endpoints.think_basic: PASS - POST /api/echoai3/think returns message_id, response, session_id, intent, confidence, data_sources, trace_id
backend_endpoints.think_finance: PASS - Finance query classified as finance domain with gl_entries/budgets sources
backend_endpoints.think_events: PASS - Events query classified as events domain
backend_endpoints.think_inventory: PASS - Inventory query classified as inventory domain
backend_endpoints.sessions_list: PASS - GET /api/echoai3/sessions returns sessions array with preview, turn_count
backend_endpoints.session_get: PASS - GET /api/echoai3/session/{id} returns full session with messages
backend_endpoints.session_continuity: PASS - Multiple messages in same session maintain history
